name: Advanced Dentistry of Phoenixville
brand_voice: Calm, professional, reassuring. Reduces anxiety, never pushy. Always signs from 'the team at Advanced Dentistry'. HIPAA-careful: never put clinical detail in a message.
notes: 6-month hygiene recall is the #1 revenue lever — Reactivation here = recall reactivation (quiet_days ~200). No-show recovery is high value (empty chair = pure lost margin). Keep all messaging HIPAA-safe: appointment logistics only, no diagnoses.
